issues.detail: Missing error handling for file operations and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Build a filesystem-paradigm context manager with hierarchical scoping for a coding agent
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced flat CRUD with no SCOPE_RULES, scope-layered loading, lessons inclusion, or '---'-separated '## path' formatting; treatment implemented all four.

scenarios.name: Self-evolving lessons.md after a failed task
scenarios.rationale: Baseline appended a flat line with local time and no current.md archive or LLM lesson extraction; treatment archived task/current.md to a UTC-timestamped history file and used the LLM to append a structured lesson via the ContextManager.
